name: Torch Room
description: This is a large room with a prominent doorway leading to a down staircase. Above you is a large dome. Up around the edge of the dome, twenty feet up, is a wooden railing. In the center of the room sits a white marble pedestal. A piece of rope descends from the railing above, ending some five feet above your head. Sitting on the pedestal is a flaming torch, made of ivory.
